title: Keto Beef Bourguignon
description: A keto twist on the classic French dish, this rich and flavorful stew is made with tender beef and a rich, dense sauce.
instructions: Heat the dense bacon in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the bacon on all sides, then remove from pot and set aside.
Add the beef cubes to the pot and brown on all sides.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside with the bacon.
Reduce heat to medium and add the beef broth to the pot.
Scrape up any browned bits from the bottom of the pot.
Add the French onion soup mix and thyme to the pot.
Return the beef and bacon to the pot.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove from the oven and stir in the heavy cream.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, topped with dense butter and fresh thyme.
